description_long: A young adult female figure stands confidently, holding a large rifle with both hands across her torso. She has straight, chin-length hair with blunt bangs and a neutral facial expression. Her outfit consists of a short-sleeved, fitted dress with a high collar, paired with shorts and a single fishnet stocking on her left leg. She wears chunky, high-ankle boots and has a visible thigh holster or pouch strapped to her right leg. The figure's overall appearance suggests a modern, urban, and slightly edgy style, with a mix of tactical and casual elements. The weapon and accessories contribute to a sense of readiness and assertiveness.
description: A young woman in a short dress, boots, and fishnet stocking stands holding a rifle, exuding a modern, urban, and tactical vibe.
description_view_0: Front view shows the figure's face, rifle held across the body, and details of the dress, boots, and fishnet stocking.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the rifle's length, and the holster on the right thigh.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the dress, hair, and both legs, with the fishnet stocking and boots visible.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the arm holding the rifle, the holster, and the figure's posture.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved fitted dress with high collar, shorts, single fishnet stocking, thigh holster
attribute_hairstyle: chin-length straight hair with blunt bangs
